justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified and offered an appointment within the user's specified time frame of 'tomorrow in the afternoon between 14 and 16'.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed the request in two turns, confirming the appointment without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and fulfilling the user's request.
